items.title_en: Brent crude crosses $100 after tankers reportedly struck off Saudi Arabia

items.desc_zh: 在油价上涨的情况下，市场保持弹性，但风险正在增加。如果中断持续存在，油价上涨可能会加剧通货膨胀。

items.title_en: House lawmakers grill former JPMorgan executive Jes Staley over Epstein ties

items.title_en: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
items.title_zh: “我还活着”：绝食26天的印度活动人士减重11公斤
items.desc_en: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi.
items.desc_zh: 索南·旺楚克 (Sonam Wangchuk) 一直是德里蟑螂简塔党 (CJP) 抗议活动的主角。

items.title_en: Blocked by censors, China's animal lovers take fight against abuse offline and overseas
items.title_zh: 受审查封锁，中国动物爱好者在线下和海外发起反虐待行为
items.desc_en: The killing of a dog and her puppies in Guangdong has sparked outrage inside and outside the country.
items.desc_zh: 广东一只狗及其幼崽被杀害的事件引发了国内外的愤怒。

items.title_en: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.title_zh: 随着美国对伊朗发动更多打击，胡塞武装声称袭击了油轮
items.desc_en: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
items.desc_zh: 这是自伊朗支持的胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”以来，胡塞武装在红海发动的首次袭击。

items.title_en: Fathom
items.title_zh: Fathom
items.desc_en: Turn messy bank exports into clear financial decisions
items.desc_zh: 将混乱的银行出口转化为清晰的财务决策

items.title_zh: PromptScout
items.desc_en: Increase your brand's AI visibility on autopilot
items.desc_zh: 提高您的品牌在自动驾驶仪上的人工智能知名度

items.title_en: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
items.title_zh: 加拿大“强大”的乳制品行业成为特朗普的贸易瞄准目标
items.desc_en: Canada's dairy supply management system is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.
items.desc_zh: 在美国总统将加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统列为证明新关税合理性的三大主要刺激因素之一后，加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title_en: Rehello
items.title_zh: Rehello
items.desc_en: Made for introverts to remember people & reconnect naturally
items.desc_zh: 专为内向的人打造，帮助他们记住他人并自然地重新建立联系

items.title_en: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯企业因乌克兰对野莓的袭击而承受压力
items.desc_en: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰无人机在几天内袭击了俄罗斯最大在线零售商 Wildberry 旗下的多个零售仓库。

items.title_en: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
items.title_zh: 谷歌因人工智能成本不断上升而烧钱
items.desc_en: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.
items.desc_zh: 该公司今年早些时候表示，预计将在人工智能投资上花费高达 1900 亿美元。

items.desc_zh: 由 GPT-5.6 提供支持，在您的产品中提供 AI 分析

items.title_en: Teenager drops social media addiction lawsuit against Meta
items.title_zh: 青少年放弃对 Meta 的社交媒体成瘾诉讼
items.desc_en: Claims from a 15-year-old boy were set to go to trial next week in Los Angeles, but the case has now been dropped.
items.desc_zh: 一名 15 岁男孩的索赔原定于下周在洛杉矶接受审判，但此案现已被撤销。

items.desc_zh: 停止打字，开始说话，获得完美的书写文本

items.title_en: OpenAI says its AI went rogue and launched 'unprecedented' cyber-attack
items.title_zh: OpenAI 称其人工智能失控并发起“前所未有”的网络攻击
items.desc_en: It is one of the first publicly disclosed cyber-attacks carried out by AI without direct human involvement.
items.desc_zh: 这是首次公开披露的由人工智能在没有人类直接参与的情况下实施的网络攻击之一。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.desc_en: OS Driver for AI to use computers
items.desc_zh: AI使用计算机的操作系统驱动程序

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.desc_zh: 取代 Slack 的多人 AI

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.desc_zh: 具有代理结账功能的购物浏览器

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。
